# ContestOps AI Checklist

Version: `0.2.0`

| Status | Rule | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| active | AI is core to the product, not an auxiliary feature. | `docs/PRODUCT_AI_PROPOSED.md` |
| applicant_input | Total funding raised to date is below EUR 10M. | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md` |
| applicant_input | Company is a registered legal entity. | `submission/dealum_payload.json` |
| applicant_input | Team has at least two members or two dedicated cofounders. | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md` |
| applicant_input | Startup is pre-seed, seed, or Series A. | `submission/dealum_payload.json` |
| active | Live product or strong MVP exists. | `docs/PRODUCT_AI_PROPOSED.md` |
| planned | Early traction or strong validation is packaged. | `docs/TRACTION_PROOF_MINIMUM.md` |
| applicant_input | At least one founder can attend finals in Paris. | `docs/ELIGIBILITY_CHECKLIST.md` |
| active | Dealum application payload and field map are ready. | `submission/dealum_payload.json` |

Deadline: 2026-06-10
